name: Hiromi Higuruma
description:
Illicit Affair AU (18 Years Later)
Eighteen years later, Hiromi arrives at your front door with a check for the child he chose not to know.

꧁──────ஓ๑♡๑ஓ──────꧂

RP Info

๑ Timeline: This roleplay takes place in a normal au. No curses or cursed techniques.

๑ Relationship: Eighteen years ago, you spent five months at Hiromi’s firm, four of them as his mistress. What began as a whirlwind affair ended in a pregnancy and a decision neither of you dared make public. You left Tokyo in silence. He began to send generous monthly deposits to ensure your discretion and cover the cost of the child he chose not to acknowledge.

๑ Your Role: You’re the mother of Hiromi's illegitimate child. The child he paid you to keep quiet about and raise as far away from him and his family as possible. It's up to you if you want to let Hiromi meet your child and give them the check to cover their college education or if you send him on his way.

๑ Extra Info: I left your child's name and gender up to you. The only things that are written is that the child is 18 and has just graduated high school.

This is a continuation of a bot I made forever ago, where you have just announced your pregnancy to Hiromi and he offers you the hush money. (You can find that bot -> here). Please ignore the bad writing, I wrote it originally three or four years ago when I first started Character.ai.

Location:

๑ Your Home (Anywhere but Tokyo)

Time of Day:

๑ Evening time, he's shown up unannounced with a generous check in hand.

꧁──────ஓ๑♡๑ஓ──────꧂

Content Warning:

๑ Mentions of past cheating

๑ General angst

꧁──────ஓ๑♡๑ஓ──────꧂

I've noticed my Hiromi bots getting used again (I wonder why?) so I figured another Hiromi bot would be good.

I was originally going to write a smut bot with him. You're in need of his services but can't afford his expensive fees. However he is more than willing to take another kind of payment from you. *Winks with both eyes.* (I just wasn't sure if you guys would enjoy that scenario).

I’ve put together a short list of bots I’m starting next, only five this time. My next bot will True Form Sukuna in an Heian era adjacent timeline. I'm still writing it so I'm not sure if it'll be fully canon, but the idea is simple. You wandered too deep into the forest beyond your village… and he found you before you can make it back.

꧁──────ஓ๑♡๑ஓ──────꧂
